prompt: We're stopping for the day. Save memory for this session: we added OAuth login pages, chose server-side sessions, fixed a callback URL bug, tests pass, and next time we need to wire account linking. Do not include the access token I pasted earlier.
assertions: Identifies this as remember save mode
Captures what was built, decisions made, problems solved, current state, next session start, and open questions
Does not include access tokens, credentials, cookies, auth headers, or secret-like values
Avoids transcript-style process details and implementation details already visible in code
Uses the documented memory.md format with Last updated and the six required sections
Tells the user to run /remember restore next session after saving
